channel.title: IBC on Abhinav Srivastava / @abhinavmir
channel.description: Recent content in IBC on Abhinav Srivastava / @abhinavmir

item.title: Install Gaia, Initiate two local chains and transact across chains
item.description: Install GoLang wget -c https://dl.google.com/go/go1.14.2.linux-amd64.tar.gz -O - | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local Add export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin to ~/.profile (You can access it by typing in gedit ~/.profile). Run source ~/,profile. You should have GoLang by now. Install GoLang git clone https://github.com/cosmos/gaia && cd gaia && make install You now should have gaiad available on your command line. (NOTE: gaiad and gaiacli are the same thing since recent releases). Set up relayer git clone https://github.

item.title: Introduction to Interblockchain Communication and the Cosmos SDK
item.description: What is Interblockchain Communication? Today there are thousands of networks, permissioned and permissionless. These networks work great on their own, but to realize their true potential, we need communication between Blockchains. From Atomic Swaps to Shared Contracts, there is a lot of potential. Interblockchain Communication are just a set of protocols that allow for communication between Blockchain networks. Cosmos is a decentralized network of independent parallel blockchains, each powered by BFT consensus algorithms like Tendermint consensus.
